chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1271 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 10644/16 21.11.2016. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. As per parawise comments, present respondent No.5-Sht. Muli has filed a Constitutional Petition against the present petitioner being C.P No.D- 1790/2016, which is still sub judice in this Court. Be that as it may, respondents are restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioner and if private respondents have any genuine grievance against the petitioner, the same shall be agitated through due process of law and not otherwise. With these observations and directions, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
